home.description: I build clean, responsive web applications using React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. Currently studying Tecnicatura en Programación at UTN.

about.title: Franco Kaddour
about.subtitle: Web Developer
about.bio1: Hey! I'm a web developer from Buenos Aires, Argentina. I specialize in frontend development with JavaScript, React, and TypeScript, but I also have knowledge in backend development with Node.js.
about.bio2: I'm currently studying Tecnicatura en Programación at UTN (Universidad Tecnológica Nacional). I'm passionate about creating clean, performant, and user-friendly web applications.
about.techStackDesc: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and various other modern web development tools.
about.projectsDesc: I've worked on several projects including Espacio Vina, Miga Club, and La Basica. Each project has taught me valuable lessons in full-stack development and user experience design.
about.contactDesc: Feel free to reach out, you can find all my social networks

projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: Here's a collection of my recent work. These projects showcase my skills in web development, design, and problem-solving.

espacioVina.name: Espacio Vina
espacioVina.description: A modern wine experience platform. Built with React and Node.js featuring product catalog, user authentication, and online booking system.

migaClub.name: Miga Club
migaClub.description: A community platform for music lovers and artists. Features user profiles, event management, and social interaction capabilities.

laBasica.name: La Basica
laBasica.description: A music education and collaboration platform. Built to help musicians learn, practice, and collaborate with others in real-time.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Feel free to reach out to me through any of the social platforms below. I'm always open to new opportunities and connections.
